metadata.description: saas-dev — Enterprise SaaS scaffolding for Django + React + Flutter. One install: 16 skills, PRD-to-app automation, premium UI.

plugins.name: saas-dev
plugins.description: Full-stack SaaS scaffolding suite. PRD to complete app automation. Django + React + Flutter. Autonomous brainstorm, plan, execute pipeline. Enterprise patterns: multi-tenancy, audit logs, 2FA, feature flags, full-text search, webhooks, field encryption, K8s, GDPR. Premium UI: glassmorphism, aurora, neumorphism, Flutter animations.

plugins.name: ui-ux-pro-max
plugins.description: Optional UI/UX enhancement for saas-dev. 67 styles, 161 color palettes, 57 font pairings across React, Flutter, Next.js. Install alongside saas-dev for premium design intelligence.
